exercises.name: Shoulder Rolls
exercises.instruction: Roll your shoulders slowly and comfortably.

exercises.name: March in Place
exercises.instruction: Stand tall and march at an easy pace.

exercises.name: Sit to Stand
exercises.instruction: Stand from a stable chair with control, then sit slowly.

exercises.name: Wall Push-Ups
exercises.instruction: Keep your body straight and move toward the wall with control.

exercises.name: Calf Stretch
exercises.instruction: Keep the back heel down and hold a gentle stretch.
